docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANTOINETTE TERWILLIGER IS PRESENT.
